general_info.definition: nitrogen and chlorine dual-doped carbon nanodots

method.conditions: 0.4 g glucose mixed with 4.0 mL concentrated HCl and 6.0 mL 1,2-ethylenediamine in a glass beaker; spontaneous heat from neutralization

post_treatment: dialyzed against 1L ultrapure water in a dialysis membrane tube (MWCO=500-1000Da)

applications.comparative_advantage: wide linear range (0.1-35μM), high selectivity, significant sensitivity (limit of detection LOD=38nM), great simplicity,higheconomy-effectivenessandfast analysis.
